title: i despise working on my games sometimes
author: corbin
body:
ok so basically whenever i work on ports or games, i get these bursts of energy and dedication
but these fuckers have to ruin it and always rush me
give me fucking time you pinko commie loser 
gosh
insensitive pieces of shit
if i had a gun and all the ammo in the fucking world you'd be my target
ill talk more later im too tired
